This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to mitigate conditions such as arthritis and oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of Suttonia kauaiensis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
